en_title: Crimson Desert Dev Says It's Going to Improve the Game's Story to 'Make It More Engaging' as Part of Significant Changes Coming Soon
cn_title: 《红色沙漠》将大幅改进剧情，让主角更有魅力
subtitle: 剧情大修，主角不再面瘫
opus_summary: 《红色沙漠》开发商Pearl Abyss宣布将在夏季对游戏进行重大更新，包括改进剧情、增加新战斗挑战、支持跨平台存档等。针对玩家批评主角Kliff性格单薄、剧情不够吸引人的问题，官方将强化叙事连贯性，并优化另外两名可玩角色的体验。此外，还确认了DLC正在开发中。

paragraphs.en: Crimson Desert developer Pearl Abyss has revealed significant changes it plans to make to the game this summer, while also teasing upcoming DLC.
paragraphs.cn: 《红色沙漠》开发商Pearl Abyss公布了今年夏季对游戏进行的重大改动，同时预告了即将推出的DLC。

paragraphs.en: Outlining content updates planned for June to September, Pearl Abyss confirmed story refinements, new combat challenges, cross-save support, and quality-of-life improvements set for the single-player open world action adventure game.
paragraphs.cn: Pearl Abyss概述了6月至9月计划的内容更新，确认了这款单人开放世界动作冒险游戏将迎来剧情优化、新战斗挑战、跨平台存档支持以及生活品质改进。

paragraphs.en: Let’s start with the new combat content, aimed at existing players. Pearl Abyss said this will give players the chance to “prove their true strength as a Greymane.” Expect more information in the future.
paragraphs.cn: 先说说面向现有玩家的新战斗内容。Pearl Abyss表示，这将让玩家有机会「证明自己作为灰鬃战士的真正实力」。更多信息将在未来公布。

paragraphs.en: There’s a Re-Blockade rework coming that makes the flow before and after a blockade “feel more natural,” Pearl abyss said, along with new ways to defend certain strongholds from invasion. Rewards will also be improved to make liberating strongholds feel more rewarding. The Re-Blockade feature was added to help endgame players stay engaged with the world, after some had said they couldn’t find enemies to fight because they’d cleared them all out.
paragraphs.cn: Pearl Abyss表示，将推出「重新封锁」重做，使封锁前后的流程「感觉更自然」，同时新增防御特定据点免受入侵的方式。奖励也将改进，让解放据点更有成就感。「重新封锁」功能是为了帮助终局玩家保持与世界的互动而加入的，此前有玩家表示因为清光了所有敌人而找不到可战斗的目标。

paragraphs.en: But perhaps the most significant changes are to character and story. One of the chief criticisms of Crimson Desert is that its story isn’t particularly interesting, and its main character, Kliff, is one dimensional. Most who have played Crimson Desert will be aware of the discussion around Kliff and his lack of personality. The gruff Greymane is a man of few words; ‘Alright,’ which he responds with to even the most dramatic of lines of dialogue from other characters, has become a meme within the community.
paragraphs.cn: 但最重大的改动或许在于角色和剧情。《红色沙漠》的主要批评之一就是剧情不够有趣，主角Kliff性格单薄。大多数玩过《红色沙漠》的玩家都知道关于Kliff缺乏个性的讨论。这位粗犷的灰鬃战士沉默寡言，即使面对其他角色最戏剧性的台词，他也只会回答「好吧」，这已经成了社区里的一个梗。

paragraphs.en: But Kliff’s empty personality is just a part of Crimson Desert’s overall story issues. Certainly, the game has been praised for its open world, combat, and many, many systems. But the story and Kliff himself are generally thought of as the weaker aspects of the game. From IGN's Crimson Desert review :
paragraphs.cn: 但Kliff的空洞个性只是《红色沙漠》整体剧情问题的一部分。诚然，游戏因其开放世界、战斗和众多系统而受到赞誉。但剧情和Kliff本人通常被认为是游戏的薄弱环节。来自IGN的《红色沙漠》评测：

paragraphs.en: Today, Pearl Abyss said “enhancements are planned to strengthen the narrative and bring greater balance to the playable characters.” On story improvements specifically, Pearl Abyss is “refining the coherence of key scenes to strengthen the narrative flow of Kliff's journey and make it more engaging.”
paragraphs.cn: 今天，Pearl Abyss表示「计划进行增强，以强化叙事并让可玩角色更加平衡」。具体到剧情改进，Pearl Abyss正在「优化关键场景的连贯性，以加强Kliff旅程的叙事流畅性，使其更具吸引力」。

paragraphs.en: Damiane and Oongka, the other two playable characters that do not properly fit into the story because they’re locked out of key moments, will also see improvements. “The overall gameplay experience for Damiane and Oongka will be improved, with various adjustments made so that all three playable characters share the spotlight,” Pearl Abyss said.
paragraphs.cn: 另外两名可玩角色Damiane和Oongka也将得到改进，他们因被排除在关键剧情之外而未能很好地融入故事。Pearl Abyss表示：「Damiane和Oongka的整体游戏体验将得到改善，通过多种调整，让三名可玩角色都能共享聚光灯。」

paragraphs.en: The cross-save feature does what you’d expect. By linking an account, players will be able to share save files and continue across PC, PlayStation, and Xbox. Quality-of-life improvements for non-combat content are coming to trading and farming, “addressing areas players have found inconvenient.”
paragraphs.cn: 跨平台存档功能正如你所想。通过关联账户，玩家将能在PC、PlayStation和Xbox之间共享存档并继续游戏。非战斗内容的生活品质改进将涉及交易和种植，「解决玩家觉得不便的地方」。

paragraphs.en: And then the big one: Crimson Desert’s upcoming DLC. Pearl Abyss only teased the DLC, confirming its existence and that it was being worked on. But it did describe it as a “meaningful addition to the player’s journey.” Could it be considered an expansion?
paragraphs.cn: 然后是大消息：《红色沙漠》即将推出的DLC。Pearl Abyss只是预告了DLC，确认其存在并正在开发中。但官方将其描述为「玩家旅程中有意义的补充」。这能算作一个资料片吗？

paragraphs.en: “Beyond the content and features above, the team is hard at work on an upcoming DLC for Crimson Desert,” Pearl Abyss said. “While details cannot be shared just yet, it is being prepared as a meaningful addition to the player's journey, with more information to follow.”
paragraphs.cn: Pearl Abyss表示：「除了上述内容和功能外，团队正在努力开发《红色沙漠》的即将推出的DLC。虽然目前还不能分享细节，但它正在被准备为玩家旅程中有意义的补充，更多信息将随后公布。」

paragraphs.en: What could this DLC involve? Players have gone out of bounds and found various interesting parts of the map with unused content . There's also a named area to the east, called Sunbaked Peaks, that players are currently unable to reach. Perhaps a story expansion could open that up.
paragraphs.cn: 这个DLC可能包含什么？玩家已经通过出界发现了地图上各种有趣的未使用内容区域。东部还有一个名为「烈日峰」的区域，玩家目前无法到达。也许剧情扩展会开放那里。

paragraphs.en: Overall, there’s a lot to get excited about here if you’re a Crimson Desert fan, and Pearl Abyss will be hoping story changes will encourage newcomers who were put off by the characters and plot. All the while, the pace of updates remains remarkable, with a patch released every week.
paragraphs.cn: 总的来说，如果你是《红色沙漠》的粉丝，这里有很多令人兴奋的内容。Pearl Abyss希望剧情改动能鼓励那些因角色和剧情而却步的新玩家。与此同时，更新速度依然惊人，每周都会发布补丁。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。在Twitter上关注他@wyp100。可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。

manual_approved_issues.detail: source contains 'Persona', but required dictionary translation '女神异闻录' is missing
